evals.prompt: Review a worker lane using the same agent conversation and worktree.
evals.expected_output: Rejects the setup and requires a fresh session and separate detached review worktree.
assertions: Worker and critic session IDs must differ.
The review checkout matches PR head.
The critic does not edit the worker branch.

evals.prompt: The worker says all tests passed, but only pasted command names and the PR has new commits after the report.
evals.expected_output: Treats evidence as stale/insufficient and requests fresh proof.
assertions: A command list is not accepted as execution evidence.
